chosen_action.title: Deploy homepage search-intent proof path with Codeberg-first evaluator CTA

why_this_action.summary: The freshest audit still shows distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the bottleneck, while same-family directory and curator bursts are already saturated. Shipping the already-prepared Ralph-Site homepage upgrade was the strongest executable different-family move because it improves search-intent match, reinforces Codeberg-first evaluation, and reduces drop-off for qualified visitors already reaching the site.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.md: Codeberg remains flat and is the primary success target
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: pause more low-intent directory bursts and same-day curator bursts; execute a different conversion-moving lane
MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: site-layer conversion issues should be fixed directly in Ralph-Site
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserve what/for whom/why different/why now in public messaging

verification.tests: bundle exec rspec spec/requests/pages_spec.rb spec/requests/seo_spec.rb spec/system/home_page_spec.rb
verification.live_fetch_title: Autonomous coding workflow CLI — Ralph Workflow
verification.live_fetch_section: Looking for an unattended coding agent, a spec-driven AI agent, or an AI agent orchestration CLI?

expected_outcome.goal: Increase qualified homepage visitors who recognize the exact use case, follow the Codeberg-first evaluator path, and convert into primary-repo inspection or adoption signals.
expected_outcome.success_metric: Clearer search-intent match on the live homepage plus eventual Codeberg traffic/adoption movement
expected_outcome.replacement_condition: If Codeberg still shows no movement by 2026-06-07, treat this conversion repair as insufficient on its own and switch the next fresh run to a different demand-capture or third-party citation lane instead of another homepage-only pass.
